prompt: scaffold me a new project, it's going to be a recipe sharing site where people can post and browse recipes

assertions.text: Asks for or establishes a project name before scaffolding
Presents a stack recommendation table with all categories
Offers the user a chance to review/change individual categories before building
Generates a database schema with recipe-relevant tables/models
Skips or marks as unnecessary categories like payments and AI that a recipe site doesn't need
